svc.view.listSubtitle: Manage local web servers: config files, SSL certificates, sites (vhost) and process start/stop. Click a server to manage it.
svc.view.noVhosts: No sites yet. Click “New site” to create one (an include is added to the main config automatically).
svc.view.noCerts: No certificates in the SSL folder. You can “Generate self-signed” or “Import” an existing certificate / key.
svc.view.noLogs: No log files found (they are created after the service starts).
